title: Invoice
description: Internal invoice schema v0.1 — single source of truth for all output adapters. Covers mandatory XRechnung / EN 16931 Business Terms. Structural correctness only; business-rule validation (VAT math, BR-Schematron) is handled by a separate validator layer.

id.description: BT-1: Invoice number — unique identifier assigned by the seller. Required by EN 16931 and §14 UStG.

typeCode.description: BT-3: Invoice type code (UNTDID 1001). 380 = commercial invoice, 381 = credit note, 384 = corrective invoice.

issueDate.description: BT-2: Invoice issue date (YYYY-MM-DD). Required by §14 Abs. 4 Nr. 3 UStG.

currencyCode.description: BT-5: Document currency code (ISO 4217, e.g. EUR). Required by EN 16931.

businessProcessType.description: BT-23: Business process type identifier. For Peppol: urn:fdc:peppol.eu:2017:poacc:billing:01:1.0

seller.description: BG-4: Seller (invoicing party). Required by §14 Abs. 4 Nr. 1 UStG. Must include contact details (BG-6) per XRechnung rule BR-DE-2.

buyer.description: BG-7: Buyer (invoiced party). Required by §14 Abs. 4 Nr. 2 UStG.

lines.description: BG-25: Invoice lines. At least one line is required (XRechnung BR-16).

vatBreakdowns.description: BG-23: VAT breakdown by tax category. At least one entry is required.

taxExclusiveAmount.description: BT-109: Invoice total amount without VAT (sum of all line amounts). Required by §14 Abs. 4 Nr. 7 UStG.

taxAmount.description: BT-110: Total VAT amount for the invoice. Required by §14 Abs. 4 Nr. 8 UStG.

taxInclusiveAmount.description: BT-112: Invoice total amount with VAT (taxExclusiveAmount + taxAmount).

duePayableAmount.description: BT-115: Amount due for payment. Usually equals taxInclusiveAmount unless prepayment has been made.

code.description: BT-81: Payment means code (UNCL4461). 58 = SEPA credit transfer, 30 = credit transfer.

accountName.description: BT-85: Name of the account holder.

note.description: BT-22: Free-text note on the invoice (e.g. payment terms prose).

buyerReference.description: BT-10: Buyer reference. For German public sector B2G invoices this must be the Leitweg-ID.

id.description: BT-25: Preceding invoice number (for credit notes and corrective invoices).

issueDate.description: BT-26: Issue date of the preceding invoice (YYYY-MM-DD).

precedingInvoiceReference.description: BT-25 / BT-26: Reference to the invoice being corrected or credited.

name.description: BT-27 / BT-44: Seller or buyer trading name. Required by §14 Abs. 4 Nr. 1/2 UStG.

legalId.description: BT-30 / BT-47: Legal registration identifier (e.g. Handelsregisternummer HRB 12345).

vatId.description: BT-31 / BT-48: VAT registration number (Umsatzsteuer-Identifikationsnummer). Required by §14 Abs. 4 Nr. 2 UStG when applicable. German numbers start with DE.

taxRegistrationId.description: BT-32: Seller tax registration number (Steuernummer). Used by small businesses under §19 UStG who do not have a VAT ID.

electronicAddress.description: BT-34 / BT-49: Electronic address for invoice routing (e.g. email address). Required by XRechnung.

electronicAddressSchemeId.description: BT-34 / BT-49: Scheme identifier for the electronic address (e.g. EM for email, 9930 for German Leitweg-ID routing).

contact.description: BG-6: Contact. Required on the seller for XRechnung (BR-DE-2).

name.description: BT-41: Contact point (person or department name).

line1.description: BT-35 / BT-50: Address line 1 (street and house number). Required by §14 Abs. 4 Nr. 1/2 UStG.

countryCode.description: BT-40 / BT-55: Country code (ISO 3166-1 alpha-2, e.g. DE, FR).

id.description: BT-126: Line identifier — unique within the invoice.

name.description: BT-153: Item name. Required by §14 Abs. 4 Nr. 5 UStG.

quantity.description: BT-129: Invoiced quantity. Required by §14 Abs. 4 Nr. 5 UStG.

unitCode.description: BT-130: Unit of measure code (UN/ECE Recommendation 20). E.g. HUR = hours, C62 = each, KGM = kilograms.

unitPrice.description: BT-146: Item net price per unit (before line-level discounts). Required by §14 Abs. 4 Nr. 6 UStG.

lineAmount.description: BT-131: Line net amount (quantity × unitPrice, after any line discounts).

vatCategoryCode.description: BT-151: VAT category code for this line. S=standard, Z=zero-rated, E=exempt, AE=reverse charge, K=intra-EU, G=export, O=not subject to VAT (§19).

vatRate.description: BT-152: VAT rate as a percentage (e.g. 19, 7, 0). Required by §14 Abs. 4 Nr. 7 UStG.

categoryCode.description: BT-118: VAT category code (see InvoiceLine.vatCategoryCode for values).

rate.description: BT-119: VAT rate as a percentage.

taxableAmount.description: BT-116: Sum of line amounts subject to this VAT category.

taxAmount.description: BT-117: VAT amount for this category (taxableAmount × rate / 100).

exemptionReason.description: BT-120: Textual reason for VAT exemption (required by §14 Abs. 4 UStG when applicable).

exemptionReasonCode.description: BT-121: Coded reason for VAT exemption (VATEX code list).
